case_title: THE VILLAS PARKMERCED VS. PATRICK VICKERY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE VILLAS PARKMERCED
